title: Test a Debounced Search
description: Test a search flow that debounces input to avoid excessive API calls.

hints.text: Use advanceTimeBy() to control debounce timing
StandardTestDispatcher gives you control over virtual time
Add searchDelay to FakeRepository to simulate slow searches
collectLatest cancels previous collection when new value arrives

testCases.description: All debounce behavior tests should pass
testCases.expectedBehavior: Debounce prevents excess calls, executes after delay, and cancels in-flight searches

instructions: Write the code according to the description.
